steps.assistant_text: Template-sibling of eddproc_uso_func_0000038C: 2-call wrapper with int-local-arg + offset-plus-0x10 arg. Asm had an unreachable trailing jr ra inside the declared 0x34 size — trimmed .s to 0x30 and added a 1-word pad sidecar (.word 0x03E00008) via #pragma GLOBAL_ASM. First application of pad-sidecar technique to a non-nop trailing word.

metadata.verification: Verified with objdiff-cli (100% fuzzy) and objdump -M no-aliases (byte-exact). Pad sidecar applied for the stray trailing jr ra word.
